title: Go-to-market strategy narrative and critical success factors

source.file: input_data/corpus/20200803 PC-Strategy-Solution Development and GoToMarket PlanVer1.5.xlsx

grain: one row per strategy statement / critical-success-factor bullet
summary: A free-text outline of the go-to-market strategy, captured as a single column of narrative statements ("Critical success factors for EXL P&C") with an occasional outline letter. Rows are strategy bullets such as growth targets, positioning ("solutions organization vs services organization"), and what clients are telling us. Mostly a narrative/planning sheet rather than a structured table.
use_cases: What are the stated critical success factors for the P&C go-to-market plan?
What is the strategic positioning or aspiration described in the plan?
What are clients telling us according to the GTM narrative?

columns.name: Critical success factors for EXL P&C

examples.Critical success factors for EXL P&C: How: Global Market Share - ~20% CAGR; Growth Focus - $500M Annual Revenue; Industry Recognition -Thought Leader, Digital Disruptor

not_answerable.q: Which clients or accounts does each statement apply to?
not_answerable.reason: no entity/account column; free-text narrative only

not_answerable.q: What quantitative targets or measures back each factor?

warnings: mostly narrative free-text, not a structured entity table
